name: Scorchium Stone
description: Notes Part of the Magmatic Mystic Set.
effects: Shoot a spread of fireballs at the cursor. Number of Shots: 5 (arc gap: 9°) Damage: 350 (+3 per VIT over 30) (total: 1750) Projectile Speed: 15 tiles/second Range: 5 tiles Effect on enemies: Curse for 5 seconds Shots pass through obstacles Ignores defense of target
Heat Wave: Stasis on surrounding enemies (centered on player) when taking damage below 50% HP. Stasis Radius: 4 tiles Duration: 2 seconds Cooldown: 60 seconds
